name: Organic Strawberries (1 lb)
description: Plump, sweet organic strawberries picked at peak ripeness. No pesticides, no artificial anything. Perfect for snacking, smoothies, or topping your morning yogurt.

name: Hass Avocados (4-pack)
description: Ready-to-eat Hass avocados with rich, creamy flesh and nutty flavor. Perfect ripeness for guacamole, toast, or salads. Packed with healthy fats and potassium.

name: Baby Spinach (5 oz)
description: Triple-washed and ready-to-eat baby spinach leaves. Mild flavor great for salads, smoothies, or sautéing. Rich in iron, calcium, and vitamins A & C.

name: Navel Oranges (3 lb bag)
description: Sweet, seedless navel oranges bursting with vitamin C. Easy-peel thick skin makes them perfect for snacking on the go. Juicy and naturally sweet.

name: Roma Tomatoes (per lb)
description: Firm, meaty Roma tomatoes with low moisture and concentrated flavor. Ideal for cooking sauces, roasting, and fresh slicing. Locally sourced when in season.

name: Organic Whole Milk (1 gallon)
description: Certified USDA Organic whole milk from pasture-raised cows. No artificial hormones or antibiotics. Creamy, rich flavor that's great for drinking, cooking, or baking.

name: Chobani Greek Yogurt Variety Pack (8-count)
description: 8 single-serve cups in assorted flavors: strawberry, blueberry, peach, and mixed berry. 12g protein per serving. Made with only natural ingredients, no artificial flavors.

name: Tillamook Extra Sharp Cheddar (16 oz)
description: Award-winning sharp cheddar aged for a bold, complex flavor. Made from milk of cows never treated with rBST. Perfect for snacking, melting, or cheese boards.

name: Free-Range Large Eggs (12-count)
description: Grade A large eggs from hens raised on pasture with outdoor access. Rich golden yolks and firm whites. Certified humane. Freshness guaranteed.

name: USDA Choice Ribeye Steak (per lb)
description: Well-marbled USDA Choice ribeye cut fresh daily. Exceptional tenderness and rich beefy flavor. Ideal for grilling, pan-searing, or broiling. Average 1–1.2 lb per pack.

name: Atlantic Salmon Fillet (per lb)
description: Fresh-cut Atlantic salmon fillet with skin on. High in Omega-3 fatty acids and protein. Mild, buttery flavor that pairs well with lemon, herbs, or soy glaze.

name: Organic Boneless Chicken Breast (per lb)
description: Certified organic, air-chilled boneless chicken breast. No antibiotics, ever. Lean protein at its best — great for grilling, baking, stir-fry, or meal prep.

name: Wild Gulf Shrimp (1 lb, peeled & deveined)
description: Wild-caught Gulf shrimp, peeled, deveined, and flash-frozen for freshness. 21–25 count per pound. Naturally sweet with a firm texture. No preservatives added.

name: Artisan Sourdough Boule
description: Stone-oven baked sourdough with a crackling crust and chewy interior. Made with live starter culture and no preservatives. Tangy, complex flavor. Baked fresh daily.

name: Butter Croissants (6-pack)
description: Flaky, buttery French-style croissants baked fresh every morning. 72-hour laminated dough with European-style butter. Perfect with jam, ham, or just on their own.

name: Everything Bagels (6-pack)
description: New York-style everything bagels loaded with sesame seeds, poppy seeds, onion, garlic, and salt. Dense, chewy interior with a golden crust. Kettle-boiled before baking.

name: Amy's Organic Burritos (4-pack)
description: Certified organic burritos in cheddar & bean, breakfast, and black bean varieties. Made with non-GMO ingredients and wrapped in whole wheat tortillas. Quick microwave meal.

name: Häagen-Dazs Ice Cream Pint (assorted)
description: Premium ice cream made with only 5 simple ingredients. Available in vanilla, chocolate, strawberry, coffee, and dulce de leche. No artificial flavors or colors.

name: Birds Eye Steamfresh Vegetables (10 oz)
description: Flash-frozen vegetables that steam right in the bag. Available in broccoli, mixed vegetables, corn, and green beans. No sauce added — just pure vegetables. Ready in 5 minutes.

name: California Olive Ranch Olive Oil (16.9 oz)
description: 100% California extra virgin olive oil. Harvested and bottled within weeks for maximum freshness. Fresh, fruity flavor with a mild peppery finish. Non-GMO and USDA certified.

name: Barilla Pasta Variety Pack (3 boxes)
description: Three 16oz boxes of Barilla pasta: penne, spaghetti, and rigatoni. Made in Italy with 100% durum wheat semolina. Al dente texture. Non-GMO verified.

name: Quaker Old Fashioned Oats (42 oz)
description: 100% whole grain oats for a hearty, filling breakfast. Low glycemic index with 4g of fiber per serving. Versatile for oatmeal, overnight oats, granola, or baking.

name: Rao's Homemade Marinara Sauce (24 oz)
description: Slow-simmered Southern Italian marinara with San Marzano tomatoes, olive oil, and fresh basil. No added sugar, low in carbs. The #1 pasta sauce in the US.

name: Tropicana Pure Premium Orange Juice (52 oz)
description: 100% pure squeezed orange juice with no added sugars or preservatives. Pasteurized for safety. Available in original, no pulp, and some pulp varieties. High in vitamin C.

name: San Pellegrino Sparkling Water (12-pack, 11.15 oz)
description: Natural mineral sparkling water from the Italian Alps since 1899. Fine, persistent bubbles with a crisp, clean finish. Zero calories, zero sweeteners. Great for sipping or pairing with meals.

name: Bigelow Green Tea Variety Pack (40-count)
description: 40 individually sealed tea bags across 6 green tea varieties: Classic, Mint, Lemon, Pomegranate, Decaf, and Constant Comment. Rich in antioxidants. Gluten-free.

name: RXBAR Protein Bar Variety Pack (12-count)
description: Whole food protein bars with 12g protein per bar. Made with egg whites, dates, and nuts — that's it. No B.S. flavors include chocolate sea salt, peanut butter, blueberry, and more.

name: Siete Grain-Free Tortilla Chips (5 oz)
description: Light and crispy grain-free chips made with cassava and coconut flour. Perfect with salsa, guac, or solo. Paleo, vegan, gluten-free. Sea salt, lime, and nacho flavors available.

name: Boar's Head Roasted Turkey Breast (per lb)
description: Sliced to order at the deli counter. All-natural roasted turkey breast with no fillers, extenders, or artificial colors. 97% fat-free. Gluten-free. Great for sandwiches.

name: Fresh Made Guacamole (8 oz)
description: Made fresh in-store daily with ripe Hass avocados, lime juice, cilantro, jalapeño, and sea salt. No preservatives or artificial ingredients. Best within 2 days of purchase.

name: Doritos Nacho Cheese (9.75 oz)
description: The bold, cheesy crunch you know and love. Nacho Cheese Doritos — loaded with flavor and impossible to put down. A party staple since 1966.

name: Oreo Chocolate Sandwich Cookies (14.3 oz)
description: America's favorite cookie. Two crispy chocolate wafers with a sweet creme filling. Twist it, lick it, dunk it. The classic that never gets old.

name: Sour Patch Kids Original (8 oz)
description: First sour, then sweet. Sour Patch Kids in classic red, orange, green, and yellow. The candy that hits different every time.

name: Coca-Cola Classic (12-pack, 12 oz cans)
description: The original and iconic Coca-Cola. Crisp, refreshing, and unmistakably delicious. Perfect for cookouts, movie nights, or anytime you want that classic Coke taste.

name: Mountain Dew (6-pack, 16.9 oz bottles)
description: Bold citrus flavor with a serious caffeine kick. The go-to for gamers, late nights, and anyone who likes their soda with attitude.

name: DiGiorno Pepperoni Rising Crust Pizza (12 in)
description: It's not delivery, it's DiGiorno. Thick rising crust loaded with pepperoni and mozzarella. Ready in 22 minutes. The ultimate Friday night pizza.

name: Hot Pockets Pepperoni Pizza (4-count)
description: The microwave classic. Flaky crust stuffed with pepperoni and mozzarella. Ready in 2 minutes flat. The snack that got you through college.

name: Ben & Jerry's Chunky Monkey (1 pint)
description: Banana ice cream loaded with fudge chunks and walnuts. Fair trade certified. The pint that turns a bad day into a great one.

name: Kraft Macaroni & Cheese Original (5-pack)
description: The blue box that defined a generation. Creamy, cheesy, and ready in 7 minutes. The dinner that never lets you down, no matter your age.

name: Maruchan Ramen Noodles Variety Pack (24-count)
description: The ultimate budget meal. Chicken, beef, and shrimp flavors. Ready in 3 minutes. Ramen that has fueled students, late nights, and tight budgets for decades.

name: Little Debbie Cosmic Brownies (6-count)
description: Dense, fudgy brownies topped with rainbow candy-coated chips and a shiny chocolate glaze. Nostalgia in every bite.

name: Velveeta Original Pasteurized Cheese Loaf (16 oz)
description: The original liquid gold. Velveeta melts smooth every time — perfect for queso dip, grilled cheese, and mac & cheese. No real cheese melts like this.

name: Bananas (bunch, ~5 ct)
description: Sweet, perfectly ripened Cavendish bananas — nature's most portable snack. Great for smoothies, baking, or peeling and eating on the go. Naturally rich in potassium and quick-digesting carbs for sustained energy.

name: Fresh Blueberries (6 oz pint)
description: Plump, sweet-tart blueberries bursting with antioxidants and fresh-picked flavor. Grown in season and rushed to stores at peak ripeness. Perfect for yogurt parfaits, muffins, or eating by the handful.

name: Broccoli Crown (per lb)
description: Crisp, dark-green broccoli crowns packed with vitamins C and K. Versatile enough to roast, steam, stir-fry, or eat raw with dip. One of the most nutrient-dense vegetables you can put on your plate.

name: Russet Potatoes (5 lb bag)
description: Classic Idaho-style russet potatoes with fluffy interiors and thick skins — the gold standard for baked potatoes, mashed potatoes, and homemade fries. Versatile, filling, and budget-friendly.

name: Baby Carrots (16 oz bag)
description: Washed, peeled, and ready-to-snack baby carrots with natural sweetness and satisfying crunch. Great for lunchboxes, hummus dipping, and roasting. An easy way to get your daily vegetables in.

name: Lemons (4-pack)
description: Bright, juicy Eureka lemons with vibrant zest and tart juice. Squeeze into water, use in dressings, bake into desserts, or add a finishing touch to any savory dish. A kitchen essential with endless uses.

name: English Cucumbers (2-pack)
description: Long, seedless English cucumbers with thin, unwaxed skin you can eat right through. Crisp and refreshing in salads, sliced for snacking, or infused into water. No bitterness, all crunch.

name: Yellow Onions (3 lb bag)
description: Firm, pungent yellow onions that sweeten beautifully when cooked. The backbone of countless soups, stews, stir-fries, and caramelized toppings. A pantry staple no kitchen should be without.

name: Kerrygold Pure Irish Butter (8 oz)
description: Grass-fed Irish butter with a rich golden color and deeply creamy flavor that sets it apart from ordinary butter. Made from the milk of grass-grazed cows on small Irish family farms. Melts beautifully on bread, vegetables, or in the pan.

name: Philadelphia Original Cream Cheese (8 oz)
description: Smooth, tangy Philadelphia cream cheese — the standard bearer since 1872. Spread it on bagels, blend it into cheesecake, or use it as a base for dips and frostings. Consistently rich and perfectly spreadable straight from the fridge.

name: Sargento Shredded Mozzarella (8 oz)
description: Fine-shredded whole milk mozzarella that melts smooth and stretches perfectly on pizza, baked pasta, and casseroles. Sargento shreds fresh from the block for better flavor and melt. No added fillers — just real cheese.

name: Fairlife Whole Milk (52 oz)
description: Ultra-filtered milk that packs 50% more protein and 50% less sugar than regular milk, with no lactose. Rich, creamy whole milk taste without compromise. The smart upgrade for your morning glass or post-workout shake.

name: Dannon Light & Fit Vanilla Greek Yogurt (4-pack, 5.3 oz)
description: Creamy, protein-packed vanilla Greek yogurt with just 80 calories per cup. A guilt-free snack that delivers 12g of protein to keep you full and satisfied. Great on its own or layered in a parfait with fresh fruit.

name: 85% Lean Ground Beef (1 lb)
description: Fresh 85/15 ground beef with the perfect fat-to-lean ratio for juicy burgers, bold meat sauces, and hearty tacos. Never frozen, hand-packed in-store daily. The ideal everyday ground beef for any recipe.

name: Applegate Naturals Turkey Bacon (8 oz)
description: Humanely raised turkey bacon with no added nitrates or nitrites. Leaner than pork bacon with a satisfying smoky flavor and crispy texture when cooked. A smarter choice that does not sacrifice the morning ritual.

name: Tyson Air Fried Chicken Wings (2 lb)
description: Crispy, fully cooked chicken wings air-fried to golden perfection with 75% less fat than traditionally fried wings. Ready in minutes in your oven or air fryer. Game-day wings made easy, any night of the week.

name: Hot Italian Pork Sausage Links (19 oz)
description: Bold, spicy Italian sausage links seasoned with fennel, red pepper, and garlic. Perfect for pasta sauces, pizza toppings, subs, or grilling at a backyard cookout. Authentic Italian flavor in every bite.

name: Ahi Tuna Steaks (per lb)
description: Premium sushi-grade yellowfin ahi tuna steaks with deep ruby-red flesh and a clean ocean flavor. Sear for 90 seconds per side for a perfect rare center, or slice thin for poke bowls and tartare. Restaurant quality at home.

name: Dave's Killer Bread 21 Whole Grains (27 oz)
description: The gold standard of whole grain bread — hearty, seedy, and packed with 21 whole grains and seeds in every slice. USDA Organic certified with 5g of protein and 3g of fiber per slice. Bread that actually works hard for you.

name: Nature's Own Honey Wheat Bread (20 oz)
description: Soft, lightly sweet honey wheat bread that the whole family loves. No artificial colors, flavors, or high-fructose corn syrup. A lunchbox staple that toasts perfectly and holds up to any sandwich filling.

name: Thomas' Original English Muffins (6-count)
description: The original nooks-and-crannies English muffin that catches butter and jam in all the right places. Fork-split and toasted to golden perfection. Top with eggs, avocado, or your favorite spread. Breakfast perfected since 1880.

name: Pepperidge Farm Milano Dark Chocolate Cookies (7 oz)
description: Crisp, buttery oval cookies sandwiching a generous layer of rich dark chocolate. Milano cookies have been the sophisticated cookie indulgence since 1956. Perfect with an afternoon coffee or tea.

name: Totino's Pizza Rolls Pepperoni (40-count)
description: Crispy golden rolls stuffed with zesty pepperoni and melted cheese. Ready in minutes in the oven or microwave. The ultimate after-school snack, party appetizer, or late-night munchie that never disappoints.

name: Eggo Original Waffles (10-count)
description: The classic frozen waffle that pops up golden and crispy in minutes. Fluffy on the inside, crispy on the outside, and ready to top with butter and maple syrup or peanut butter and fresh berries. Morning made easy.

name: Stouffer's Meat Lovers Lasagna (10.5 oz)
description: Layers of pasta, seasoned meat sauce, ricotta and mozzarella cheese baked to comfort-food perfection. Stouffer's has been making frozen lasagna worth eating since 1946. A hearty single-serve meal ready in minutes.

name: Jose Ole Beef & Cheese Taquitos (20-count)
description: Crispy rolled corn tortillas stuffed with seasoned beef and melted cheese. Bake or air-fry for a perfectly crunchy exterior. Great as a snack, appetizer, or quick Mexican-inspired dinner with salsa and sour cream.

name: Alexia Organic Oven Fries (15 oz)
description: USDA Organic thin-cut oven fries seasoned with sea salt and cracked black pepper. Crisped in the oven without deep frying for a lighter take on a beloved classic. Made from whole potatoes, never potato paste.

name: Skippy Creamy Peanut Butter (16.3 oz)
description: America's favorite peanut butter — smooth, rich, and ready for sandwiches, smoothies, baking, and straight-from-the-spoon snacking. Made with no artificial sweeteners and that unmistakable Skippy flavor everyone knows.

name: Heinz Tomato Ketchup (32 oz)
description: The one and only Heinz — thick, tangy, and perfectly balanced ketchup that has defined the condiment category since 1876. Made from red ripe tomatoes with no artificial colors or flavors. The condiment every table deserves.

name: Campbell's Condensed Tomato Soup (4-pack, 10.75 oz)
description: The iconic red-and-white can that has fed generations. Rich, smooth condensed tomato soup ready in minutes — just add one can of water or milk for extra creaminess. Perfect alongside a grilled cheese on a cold day.

name: Progresso Chicken Noodle Soup (19 oz)
description: Hearty, ready-to-eat chicken noodle soup loaded with real chicken, egg noodles, carrots, and celery in a savory broth. No MSG added. The soup you reach for when the weather turns or you need something warm and comforting.

name: Uncle Ben's Ready Rice Original (8.8 oz)
description: Perfectly cooked long-grain white rice ready in just 90 seconds in the microwave. Fluffy, never clumpy, with a clean flavor that pairs with anything. The ultimate weeknight side dish for busy people who need dinner now.

name: Frank's RedHot Original Cayenne Pepper Sauce (12 oz)
description: The original Buffalo Wing sauce ingredient and one of America's most beloved hot sauces. Aged cayenne peppers blended with vinegar and garlic for a tangy heat that enhances everything without overwhelming. Put it on everything.

name: Welch's Strawberry Spread (18 oz)
description: Classic Welch's strawberry spread made with real fruit and no artificial flavors. Spreads smoothly on toast, pairs perfectly with peanut butter, and works beautifully in baked goods and dessert sauces. A lunchbox classic.

name: Gatorade Thirst Quencher Variety Pack (12-count, 12 oz)
description: The original sports drink trusted by athletes for over 50 years. Packed with electrolytes — sodium and potassium — to replenish what you sweat out during exercise. Variety pack includes Fruit Punch, Orange, Lemon-Lime, and more.

name: Red Bull Original Energy Drink (4-pack, 8.4 oz)
description: The world's most popular energy drink — crisp, slightly sweet, and delivering the boost you need with caffeine, taurine, and B-vitamins. Vitalizes body and mind for study sessions, workouts, and long drives.

name: Starbucks Cold Brew Coffee Black (4-pack, 11 oz)
description: Starbucks signature cold brew slow-steeped for 20 hours for a naturally smooth, less acidic coffee with rich, chocolatey notes. No bitterness, just bold coffee flavor. Serve over ice black or with your favorite creamer.

name: Liquid I.V. Hydration Multiplier Lemon-Lime (16-count)
description: Cellular Transport Technology delivers hydration to your bloodstream faster and more efficiently than water alone. Each stick pack delivers 2-3x the hydration of water with three times the electrolytes of a sports drink. Hydration, upgraded.

name: Celsius Sparkling Wild Berry Energy (4-pack, 12 oz)
description: The thermogenic energy drink clinically proven to accelerate metabolism when combined with exercise. Sparkling wild berry flavor with 200mg of natural caffeine, zero sugar, and no artificial preservatives. Clean energy for an active lifestyle.

name: Lay's Classic Potato Chips (8 oz)
description: America's most loved potato chip — thin, crispy, and perfectly salted with that unmistakable Lay's crunch. Made from farm-grown potatoes cooked in sunflower oil. Betcha can't eat just one.

name: Pepperidge Farm Goldfish Cheddar (6.6 oz)
description: The snack that smiles back! Baked cheddar crackers in the iconic fish shape with real cheddar cheese baked right in. Made with no artificial colors, flavors, or preservatives. Perfect for kids, lunch boxes, or afternoon snacking.

name: Kind Dark Chocolate Nuts & Sea Salt Bars (12-count)
description: Whole almonds, peanuts, and pecans dipped in dark chocolate with a pinch of sea salt for the perfect sweet-salty combination. Low glycemic index with 5g of sugar and 6g of protein per bar. Snacking that does not require compromise.

name: SkinnyPop Original Popcorn (4.4 oz)
description: Light, airy popcorn made with just 3 ingredients: popcorn, sunflower oil, and salt. No GMOs, no artificial anything, gluten-free, and only 39 calories per cup. Guilt-free snacking at its most satisfying.

name: Cheez-It Original Baked Snack Crackers (21 oz)
description: Baked square crackers made with 100% real cheese for bold, savory flavor in every crispy bite. The original cheese cracker that set the standard. Great for snacking solo, pairing with dips, or building a charcuterie spread.

name: Pringles Original (5.2 oz)
description: The stackable chip in the iconic canister. Uniform, crispy, and perfectly salted Pringles with a satisfying snap in every chip. Once you pop, the fun does not stop. Great for snacking, dipping, and road trips.

name: Nature Valley Oats 'n Honey Granola Bars (36-count)
description: Crunchy, wholesome granola bars made with whole grain oats and golden honey. No artificial colors or flavors. Each bar delivers whole grain goodness for a satisfying snack at your desk, on the trail, or in the lunchbox.

name: PopCorners Flex Protein Chips Sea Salt (5 oz)
description: Crunchy, airy chips made from popped corn and whey protein with 10g of protein per serving and only 130 calories. The satisfying chip that pulls double duty. Gluten-free with no artificial colors or flavors.

name: Sabra Classic Hummus (17 oz)
description: America's number one hummus brand — creamy, garlicky, and made with chickpeas, tahini, and olive oil for authentic Middle Eastern flavor. Perfect for dipping veggies, pita, or spreading on wraps and sandwiches.

name: Hillshire Farm Lit'l Smokies Smoked Sausage (14 oz)
description: Fully cooked smoked cocktail sausages that are crispy on the outside and juicy on the inside. Heat in a skillet, slow cooker with BBQ sauce, or wrap in crescent rolls. The party appetizer that disappears first every time.

name: Oscar Mayer Deli Fresh Oven Roasted Turkey (9 oz)
description: Thin-sliced oven roasted turkey breast with a fresh-sliced taste and clean ingredient list. No added water, no artificial preservatives. The go-to lean protein for sandwiches, wraps, and protein-packed snack plates.

name: Boar's Head Honey Ham (per lb)
description: Boar's Head premium honey ham sliced fresh at the deli counter. Lightly sweet with a clean, smoky ham flavor and no artificial ingredients. Piled high on a sandwich or layered on a charcuterie board, this is deli done right.

name: Dietz & Watson Genoa Salami (6 oz)
description: Authentic Genoa-style salami with a robust, slightly spicy flavor and tender texture. Hand-crafted with pork, wine, and Italian spices following traditional recipes. Essential for charcuterie boards, Italian subs, and pizza toppings.
